commands.branch.description: Create a branch of the current conversation at this point
commands.bridge.description: Connect this terminal for remote-control sessions
commands.btw.description: Ask a quick side question without interrupting the main conversation
commands.clear.description: Clear conversation history and free up context
commands.color.description: Set the prompt bar color for this session
commands.compact.description: Clear conversation history but keep a summary in context. Optional: /compact [instructions for summarization]
commands.context.description: Visualize current context usage as a colored grid
commands.copy.description: Copy Claude's last response to clipboard (or /copy N for the Nth-latest)
commands.cost.description: Show the total cost and duration of the current session
commands.desktop.description: Continue the current session in Claude Desktop
commands.diff.description: View uncommitted changes and per-turn diffs
commands.doctor.description: Diagnose and verify your Claude Code installation and settings
commands.effort.description: Set effort level for model usage
commands.export.description: Export the current conversation to a file or clipboard
commands.extra_usage.description: Configure extra usage to keep working when limits are hit
commands.extra_usage_noninteractive.desc: Configure extra usage to keep working when limits are hit
commands.files.description: List all files currently in context
commands.hooks.description: View hook configurations for tool events
commands.ide.description: Manage IDE integrations and show status
commands.install_github_app.description: Set up Claude GitHub Actions for a repository
commands.keybindings.description: Open or create your keybindings configuration file
commands.login.description.sign_in: Sign in with your Anthropic account
commands.logout.description: Sign out from your Anthropic account
commands.mobile.description: Show QR code to download the Claude mobile app
commands.model.description: Set the AI model for Claude Code (currently {0})
commands.output_style.description: Deprecated: use /config to change output style
commands.passes.description.with_reward: Share a free week of Claude Code with friends and earn extra usage
commands.passes.description.without_rewa: Share a free week of Claude Code with friends
commands.permissions.description: Manage allow & deny tool permission rules
commands.plan.description: Enable plan mode or view the current session plan
commands.pr_comments.description: Get comments from a GitHub pull request
commands.privacy_settings.description: View and update your privacy settings
commands.rate_limit_options.description: Show options when rate limit is reached
commands.reload_plugins.description: Activate pending plugin changes in the current session
commands.remote_env.description: Configure the default remote environment for teleport sessions
commands.remote_setup.description: Setup Claude Code on the web (requires connecting your GitHub account)
commands.rewind.description: Restore the code and/or conversation to a previous point
commands.session.description: Show remote session URL and QR code
commands.stats.description: Show your Claude Code usage statistics and activity
commands.status.description: Show Claude Code status including version, model, account, API connectivity, and tool statuses
commands.tag.description: Toggle a searchable tag on the current session
commands.terminal_setup.description: Install Shift+Enter key binding for newlines
commands.terminal_setup.description.appl: Enable Option+Enter key binding for newlines and visual bell
commands.thinkback.description: Your 2025 Claude Code Year in Review
commands.upgrade.description: Upgrade to Max for higher rate limits and more Opus
commands.vim.description: Toggle between Vim and Normal editing modes
